objectives: Implement controlled live execution plans for single_generalist, fixed_expert_chain, and dynamic_expert_council
Preserve fair shared model, endpoint, case, evidence, and evaluation baselines
Add strict invocation, token, elapsed-time, retry, stop-after, and overwrite safeguards
Run specialist outputs through schema validation, claim normalization, role validation, and domain semantic validation where implemented
Produce comparable live artifacts and a no-network combined comparison report
Keep all live execution explicit and opt-in

commands_run.command: python -m pytest tests/test_live_variant_runner.py tests/test_qwen_live_cli.py tests/test_qwen_prompts_and_plans.py tests/test_schedule_semantics.py

focused_pytest.command: python -m pytest tests/test_live_variant_runner.py tests/test_qwen_live_cli.py tests/test_qwen_prompts_and_plans.py tests/test_schedule_semantics.py

known_limitations: Only ScheduleExpert has a specialized semantic validator
The comparison report is descriptive and not statistically significant from one run per variant
Provider pricing is omitted unless supplied explicitly
Automatic live matrix execution is intentionally unsupported
recommended_first_live_command: export DASHSCOPE_API_KEY="<your-api-key>" && PYTHONPATH=src python -m project_recovery_council live-variant --variant single_generalist --model qwen-plus --allow-network
